zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Cave於1445年出生在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃時，他的父親Peter Cave35歲，母親Mary Margaret Burdett22歲。他於1464年與Thomasine Passemer在英國肯特斯坦福結婚。他們至少是8個兒子的父母。他去世於1495年9月17日在英國英格蘭諾薩普頓史爾凱特林享年50歲，埋葬在英國諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Cave于1445年出生在英国諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃时，他的父亲Peter Cave35岁，母亲Mary Margaret Burdett22岁。他于1464年与Thomasine Passemer在英国肯特斯坦福结婚。他们至少是8个儿子的父母。他去世于1495年9月17日在英国英格兰諾薩普頓史爾凱特林享年50岁，埋葬在英国諾薩普頓史爾斯坦福 奧 阿沃。

nameMeanings.name: Cave
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from a place in East Yorkshire called Cave, apparently from a river name derived from Old English cāf ‘swift’.
English (of Norman origin): nickname from Norman and Picard Old French cauf (from Latin calvus) ‘bald’.
French: topographic name for someone who lived in or near a cave, from Old French cave ‘cave’, ‘cellar’ (from Latin cavea, a derivative of cavus ‘hollow’).

variants.name: Cavin
meanings: Scottish (Wigtownshire): variant of Caveen, a shortened form of Manx Mac Dhaimhín, son of Daimhín. The personal name is a diminutive of Gaelic damh ‘bard, poet’.

variants.name: Caves
meanings: English: variant of Cave , with post-medieval excrescent -s.

variants.name: Keeve
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Cave  . This surname is rare in Britain.

variants.name: Chaffee
meanings: English (of Norman origin): descriptive nickname from a derivative of Old French chauf ‘bald’ (from Latin calvus). Compare Cave .

variants.name: Cavett
meanings: Scottish (of French origin): altered form of French Cavet, which is either a diminutive of Cave 3 or a metonymic occupational name for a laborer, one who used a cavet, an Old Occitan word for a tool for clearing ground for cultivation.

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Cave was born in 1445, in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, his father, Peter Cave, was 35 and his mother, Mary Margaret Burdett, was 22. He married Thomasine Passemer in 1464, in Stanford, Kent, England. They were the parents of at least 8 sons. He died on 17 September 1495, in Kettering, Northamptonshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 50, and was buried in Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England.

Il a épousé Thomasine Passemer en 1464, à Stanford, Kent, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 8 fils. Il est décédé le 17 septembre 1495, à Kettering, Northamptonshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 50 ans, et a été enterré à Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Angleterre.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cave è nato il nel 1445 nel Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, England, il suo padre, Peter Cave, aveva 35 anni e il suo madre, Mary Margaret Burdett, aveva 22 anni. Lui sposato Thomasine Passemer nel 1464, nel Stanford, Kent, England. Erano genitori di almeno 8 figli. ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Caveが1445年にイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンで生まれた時，父Peter Caveは35歳，母Mary Margaret Burdettは22歳であった。1464年にイギリスケントスタンフォードでThomasine Passemerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも8人の息子の親であった。彼は1495年9月17日にイギリスイギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアケッテリングで50歳で死去し，イギリスノーサンプトンシュアイアスタンフォード オン アボンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Cave(이)가 1445년 영국 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Peter Cave(은)는 35세였고, 그의 어머니 Mary Margaret Burdett(은)는 22세였다. 그는 1464년 영국 켄트 스탠퍼드에서 Thomasine Passemer(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여덟 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1495년 9월 17일 영국 잉글랜드 노르섬프토실르 케테링에서 50세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 노르섬프토실르 스탠퍼드  아폰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Cave nasceu em 1445, em Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Peter Cave, tinha 35 anos e sua mãe, Mary Margaret Burdett, tinha 22 anos. Ele casou-se com Thomasine Passemer em 1464, em Stanford, Kent, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 8 filhos. Ele faleceu em 17 de setembro de 1495, em Kettering, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 50 anos, e foi sepultado em Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Cave родился в 1445 г. в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия, его отцу по имени Peter Cave было 35 лет, а матери, которую звали Mary Margaret Burdett, 22. Он женился на женщине по имени Thomasine Passemer в 1464 г. в местности станфорд, кэнт, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 8 сыновей. Он умер 17 сентября 1495 г. в местности кеттиринг, нортамптоншир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 50 лет и был похоронен в местности станфорд он авон, нортамптоншир, Англия.

Se casó con Thomasine Passemer en 1464, en Stanford, Kent, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 8 hijos. Murió el 17 de septiembre de 1495, en Kettering, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 50 años, y fue sepultado en Stanford on Avon, Northamptonshire, Inglaterra.
